title: Senior Doctor - Neuland Laboratories - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Neuland Laboratories - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Neuland Laboratories in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Neuland Laboratories:
Neuland Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories!
